_comment: Codex hooks — reuse the SAME provider-neutral scripts as Claude Code (../.claude/hooks/*.sh), which block via exit code 2 + stderr. Codex has no per-hook 'if' matcher or env field, so every PreToolUse(Bash) script self-guards (greps the command and exits 0 when it does not apply) and config is exported inline (PROTECTED_BRANCH=main; WORKFLOW_REQUIRE_ISSUE_REF=true makes pr-validate require a 'Closes #N' issue link in the PR body, set to false to relax). Explicit timeouts mirror .claude/settings.json (Codex default is 600s). PostToolUse + Stop add the CodeRabbit-loop hooks: pr-coderabbit-loop.sh (mandatory reminder after PR creation) and coderabbit-loop-guard.sh (blocks finishing while the branch's PR has open/unresolved CodeRabbit feedback; escape WORKFLOW_SKIP_CR_LOOP=1). Format per https://developers.openai.com/codex/hooks.
